# Portal Documentation Review — 2026-05-22

## Scope

- **Repository:** `octopus-components-management-portal`
- **Base branch audited:** `origin/develop` at commit `c082f4e`
- **Audit pass:** `docs/review-pass`
- **Audited tree:**
  - `AGENTS.md`, `DOCS.md`, `README.md` (repo root)
  - `docs/architecture.md`
  - `docs/pr38-review-plan.md`
  - `docs/adr/001-spring-cloud-gateway-bff.md`
  - `docs/features/{admin-migration, admin-mode, app-footer, audit-log, component-detail, component-list}.md`
  - `docs/onboarding/components-management-portal.md`
  - `docs/tech-debt/TD-002-openapi-types.md`, `TD-003-persisted-session-store.md`, `TD-004-tls-ingress-migration.md`, `TD-005-schema-v2-followups.md`

Paths below are plain code-style paths, not links — they describe the pre-rename state of CRS (`docs/db-migration/`) and must not resolve as live links in this historical record.

## Reference sweep (Step 0.5)

Cross-repo URLs from Portal docs into CRS use `https://github.com/octopusden/octopus-components-registry-service/blob/v3/docs/db-migration/...`. After the CRS PR (`docs/review-pass`) lands on `v3` and renames `docs/db-migration/` → `docs/registry/`, every URL below must be rewritten to the new path.

### Pattern `docs/db-migration` (cross-repo URL rewrites)

| File:line | Notes |
|---|---|
| `AGENTS.md:10` | ADR-012 GitHub URL |
| `DOCS.md:32,33,34,35,36,37,38,39` | CRS-owned table — 8 rows mention `docs/db-migration` |
| `DOCS.md:38` | Special case: "Implementation status \| `docs/db-migration/implementation-progress.md`" — the CRS file is being **deleted** in the CRS PR, not just renamed. Replace this row with a row pointing at CRS ADR-007/012/014 or remove if no good stand-in. |
| `README.md:13,38,65` | ADR-012 URL (×2) + a `docs/db-migration/deployment/dev-run.md` mention in the local-dev block comment |
| `docs/adr/001-spring-cloud-gateway-bff.md:4,22,23,24,40` | ADR-012 (canonical) URL, ADR-004 URL, SYS-033/MIG-027 contract URLs, ADR-009 (Superseded) URL |
| `docs/architecture.md:3,147,148` | ADR-012 URL ×2, ADR-004 URL |
| `docs/features/admin-migration.md:74,84` | MIG-028 + MIG-024 contract URLs |
| `docs/features/admin-mode.md:7` | ADR-004 URL |
| `docs/features/app-footer.md:21` | SYS-033 contract URL |
| `docs/features/component-detail.md:92` | ADR-004 URL |
| `docs/features/component-list.md:44` | SYS-035 — uses a non-URL path `octopus-components-registry-service/docs/db-migration/requirements-common.md`; rewrite to `docs/registry/...` |
| `docs/tech-debt/TD-002-openapi-types.md:61,62` | ADR-012 URL + CRS TD-003 path mention |
| `docs/tech-debt/TD-003-persisted-session-store.md:41,53` | ADR-012 URL ×2 |
| `frontend/src/components/ui/icons/brand-icons.tsx:3` | Stale comment referencing a personal-worktree absolute path: `octopus-components-registry-service/_wt/docs-v3-actualization/docs/db-migration/prototypes/index.html`. Rewrite to the post-rename in-repo path: `octopus-components-registry-service/docs/registry/prototypes/index.html`. |

## A→B narrative health

CRS ADR-012 (canonical) and CRS ADR-009 (superseded) carry the full extraction story; Portal docs correctly defer to those.

What is missing in Portal: a one-paragraph A→B recap at the **top** of `docs/architecture.md`. A reviewer opening Portal cold should understand in 30 seconds that the UI used to live inside CRS (`components-registry-ui/` Gradle module) and was extracted in PR #147 (commit `26278f29`) to a standalone Spring Cloud Gateway BFF + Vite SPA — before diving into BFF mechanics.

After cleanup, the entry-point readers should follow is `README.md` → `docs/architecture.md` → ADR-001 (which links out to CRS ADR-012). Cold-read test must pass on this path before requesting external review.

## Considered-Alternatives backfill

ADR-001 is explicitly a summary that defers rationale and alternatives to CRS ADR-012. No backfill required on the Portal side. CRS ADR-009 / ADR-012 carry the considered-alternatives content.

## Cleanup punch-list

Mapped to commits in the docs/review-pass PR:

1. **Commit 1** — Delete `docs/pr38-review-plan.md`. Rewrite every `docs/db-migration` cross-repo URL to `docs/registry` across the 14 files listed in §"Reference sweep". Replace the `DOCS.md:38` "Implementation status" row (target file is deleted in CRS PR, not just renamed). Run a final `git grep "docs/db-migration"` in the worktree before commit — expect zero hits outside this audit file.

2. **Commit 2** — Fix accuracy drift in `docs/architecture.md`:
   - Re-grep `SecurityConfig.kt` for the entry-point block; update the cited line range in §"Auth entry-point split".
   - Update the CSRF-policy line range to the actual block (~125–131).
   - Add `/assets/` to the prose enumeration of `SpaFallbackFilter` exclusions in §"SPA fallback".
   - Insert a 2-sentence A→B paragraph at the top.

3. **Commit 3** — Cover missing features:
   - `docs/features/component-list.md` — §"Multi-select filters" (`buildSystem`, `system`, `owner`, `labels`) + §"+N overflow expand". Reference PRs #22, #40.
   - `docs/features/component-detail.md` — §"Schema-v2 editors on General tab" (TC-projects-list, DocLinks, ArtifactIds). Reference PR #38 Wave B.
   - New `docs/features/admin-tc-resync.md` — TC resync flow, async-job pattern, auto-resolved tile. Reference PRs #28, #35, #37. Template: `docs/features/admin-mode.md`.
   - `docs/features/admin-migration.md` — cross-link to the new TC-resync doc.

4. **Commit 4** — Create `docs/tech-debt/TD-001-playwright-keycloak-fixture.md`. Real minimal entry with Context / Symptoms / Acceptance criteria. Verify the three inbound links (README, architecture.md, admin-migration.md) resolve.

## Sequencing constraint

This Portal PR must merge **after** the CRS PR lands on `v3`. The Portal PR's `https://github.com/octopusden/octopus-components-registry-service/blob/v3/docs/registry/...` URLs only resolve once CRS `v3` carries the renamed folder.

## Verification expected to pass after PR

- `git ls-files '*.md' '*.adoc'` link-integrity scan: green (no broken intra-repo links, no broken refs to `docs/tech-debt/TD-001-*`).
- `git grep "docs/db-migration"`: zero hits outside this audit file.
- Cold-read of `README.md` → `docs/architecture.md` → ADR-001: a new reviewer can follow the Portal-side story without external context.
- `./gradlew check`: green.
- `npm --prefix frontend run build`: green.
